title: Edge-Overlap Baseline, Motif Fingerprint Stability, and Multi-Scale Feature Complementarity on 200 Attribution Graphs
summary: Demo notebook demonstrating edge-overlap baseline, motif fingerprint stability, and multi-scale feature complementarity analysis on 80 Neuronpedia attribution graphs (10 per domain, 8 domains). Loads pre-computed 4D motif count-ratio fingerprints and 8D graph statistics, computes cosine similarity matrices, runs spectral clustering at K=2,3,4,6,8 with permutation tests (p=0.005), evaluates fingerprint stability via Fisher Discriminant Ratio and Cohen's d, and assesses feature complementarity. Produces 3-panel visualization: NMI vs K, stability bar chart, and motif fingerprint distributions by domain.
